nodes.label: Check
nodes.content: CI lint/typecheck workflow. Runs on push and PR to main. Matrix across Python 3.12/3.13. Steps: checkout, setup-uv, uv sync, ruff format check, ruff lint, pyright typecheck, pytest.

nodes.label: Claude Code Review
nodes.content: AI code review workflow. Triggered by pull_request_target on opened/synchronize/ready_for_review/reopened. Runs anthropics/claude-code-action@v1 with code-review plugin to review PR diffs.

nodes.label: Claude Code
nodes.content: AI assistant workflow. Triggered by issue_comment, PR review comment, issues, PR review (filtered by @claude mention). Runs anthropics/claude-code-action@v1 to let Claude interact on issues/PRs.

edges.label: pr_pipeline
edges.content: Both trigger on PR events. Check validates code quality; Claude Code Review provides AI review. Form a complementary PR verification pipeline.

edges.label: shared_action
edges.content: Both use anthropics/claude-code-action@v1 and require CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN. Different triggers (PR events vs issue/comment mentions) and different prompts.

edges.label: ci_infrastructure
edges.content: Both are CI/CD workflows in the same repository. Check provides automated quality gates; Claude provides interactive AI assistance for issue/PR workflows.
